Recentrer la page P250 sur l'intention p: Refocus the P250 page on the main intention of regular mid-level players: direct answer on points to be earned, ranking, registration conditions and possible cuts, short FAQ and internal links to adjacent level pages.
La page reçoit un volume d'impressions s: The page receives a significant volume of impressions but remains just outside the top 10. The priority lever is content and internal networking to cross the threshold.
Ajouter des visuels de prise, une sectio: Add grip visuals, a section on continental grip, common errors and links to basic shots, serve and beginner racket.
La page est déjà bien positionnée (top 1: The page is already well positioned (top 10) but its CTR remains below the expected median at this position. The probable gain comes from a rewriting of the Google result (title + meta).
Le CTR est anormalement bas pour la posi: The CTR is abnormally low for the current position on “padel weight loss combie calories”: rewrite the title around the concrete benefit, reinforce the meta with a distinctive angle and check if a featured snippet or a PAA dominates the SERP.
Le CTR est anormalement bas pour cette p: The CTR is abnormally low for this position. SERP features (featured snippet, Knowledge Panel, ads) probably capture some of the clicks. Check the SERP before optimizing the title alone.
